62264.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Boy Friend

67448.title: Keeping Up Appearances : The Boy Friend
67448.description: Hyacinth gets excited when she learns that her next-door neighbour Emmet is rehearsing an amateur production of the musical `The Boyfriend'.
